title: Trait
description: Characteristic belonging to an entity and referenced by an identifier.

definitions.definition: Characteristic belonging to an entity and referenced by an identifier.
definitions.notes: - Traits can be objective (inherent?) in which case they are also observable and called properties. Traits which are not observable (directly or indirectly) need to be assigned.
definitions.sources: - Based on ISO 19143:2010, 4.21, ISO/IEC 2382:2015, 2121440, significantly modified, Note 1 added
